Operation 'extendedFindNearby' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_context. Original summary 'Extended find nearby' is vague and doesn't clearly indicate the operation's purpose. Description lacks explicit mention of required inputs (coordinates) and doesn't clearly explain the geographic scope differences. Added clarity about input requirements, geographic behavior variations, and use case context to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns the most detailed information available for a given point. In the US it returns address, street, neighborhood, and city. In other countries it returns the closest toponym.
data.description_suggestion: Returns the most detailed geographical information available for a given point (latitude/longitude). In the United States, returns address, street, neighborhood, and city details. In other countries, returns the closest toponym (named place). Useful for reverse geocoding with maximum detail level. Requires coordinates as input.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Extended find nearby' is vague and doesn't clearly indicate the operation's purpose. Description lacks explicit mention of required inputs (coordinates) and doesn't clearly explain the geographic scope differences. Added clarity about input requirements, geographic behavior variations, and use case context to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getcountrysubdivision' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about what type of subdivision is returned and what the response contains. Enhanced description clarifies the subdivision types and indicates the response includes both name and code for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns administrative subdivision for given coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Returns the administrative subdivision (state, province, or region) for given coordinates using reverse geocoding. Accepts latitude and longitude parameters and returns subdivision information including name and code.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about what type of subdivision is returned and what the response contains. Enhanced description clarifies the subdivision types and indicates the response includes both name and code for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getocean' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description is minimal. Enhanced description specifies that it uses reverse geocoding, clarifies the input parameters, and indicates what information is returned to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and output.

data.current_description: Returns the ocean or sea for given coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Returns the name of the ocean or sea at given coordinates using reverse geocoding. Accepts latitude and longitude parameters and returns the water body name and related geographic information.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is minimal. Enhanced description specifies that it uses reverse geocoding, clarifies the input parameters, and indicates what information is returned to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and output.

message: Operation 'getneighbourhood' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary lacks geographic scope specification. Description is too brief and doesn't clarify the geographic limitation or what information is returned. Improved summary specifies US scope, and enhanced description clarifies the geographic limitation, reverse geocoding method, and output details for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns the US neighbourhood for given coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Returns the US neighbourhood name and information for given coordinates using reverse geocoding. This operation is limited to United States locations. Accepts latitude and longitude parameters and returns neighbourhood details.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks geographic scope specification. Description is too brief and doesn't clarify the geographic limitation or what information is returned. Improved summary specifies US scope, and enhanced description clarifies the geographic limitation, reverse geocoding method, and output details for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getelevationastergdem' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description lacks resolution information and output details. Enhanced description adds resolution specification (30m) for consistency with other elevation operations, clarifies global coverage, and specifies the input/output parameters to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Returns elevation in meters using ASTER Global Digital Elevation Model.
data.description_suggestion: Returns elevation in meters using ASTER Global Digital Elevation Model (GDEM) data. ASTER GDEM provides global coverage with approximately 30m resolution. Accepts latitude and longitude parameters and returns elevation value.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks resolution information and output details. Enhanced description adds resolution specification (30m) for consistency with other elevation operations, clarifies global coverage, and specifies the input/output parameters to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'searchpostalcodes' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about input parameters (what query types are supported, filtering options) and output structure. Added specifics about search capabilities, filtering options, and pagination to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns a list of postal codes and places for the placename/postalcode query.
data.summary_suggestion: Search postal codes by name or code
data.description_suggestion: Searches for postal codes and associated places matching a given place name or postal code query. Accepts various search parameters including country code, postal code prefix, and result limits. Returns a list of matching postal codes with place information sorted by relevance. Supports pagination through maxRows parameter.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about input parameters (what query types are supported, filtering options) and output structure. Added specifics about search capabilities, filtering options, and pagination to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'findnearbypostalcodes' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about input options (coordinates vs postal code) and output details (distance values included). Added clarity about accepted input formats and distance-based sorting to improve AI agent's ability to determine appropriate use cases.

data.current_description: Returns nearby postal codes sorted by distance for a given location or postal code.
data.description_suggestion: Finds postal codes near a specified location or postal code, sorted by distance. Accepts coordinates (latitude/longitude) or an existing postal code as input. Returns nearby postal codes with distance information, allowing radius filtering through the radius parameter. Results are ordered by proximity to the query location.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks specificity about input options (coordinates vs postal code) and output details (distance values included). Added clarity about accepted input formats and distance-based sorting to improve AI agent's ability to determine appropriate use cases.

message: Operation 'findnearbyplacename' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description is too minimal. Missing details about required input format (coordinates), optional filtering parameters, and comprehensive output information. Added context about reverse geocoding use case and specific output fields to enhance AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns the closest populated place for given coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Finds the closest populated place to specified coordinates (latitude/longitude). Accepts geographic coordinates and optional parameters for feature class filtering and result limits. Returns the nearest populated place with its GeoName information including name, coordinates, population, and feature classification. Useful for reverse geocoding to identify nearby settlements.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is too minimal. Missing details about required input format (coordinates), optional filtering parameters, and comprehensive output information. Added context about reverse geocoding use case and specific output fields to enhance AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'findnearbytoponym' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, inconsistent_terminology. Summary uses domain term 'toponym' which may be unclear to general AI agents; 'geographic feature' is more interpretable. Description lacks input/output details and doesn't explain the distinction from findnearbyplacename operation. Added clarity about coordinate input format, filtering options, comprehensive output, and differentiation from place-name-only search.

data.current_description: Returns the closest toponym for given coordinates.
data.summary_suggestion: Find nearest geographic feature by coordinates
data.description_suggestion: Finds the closest geographic feature (toponym) to specified coordinates (latitude/longitude). Accepts geographic coordinates and optional parameters for feature type filtering and result limits. Returns the nearest toponym with complete GeoName information including name, coordinates, feature class, and administrative hierarchy. More comprehensive than place name search as it includes all feature types, not just populated places.
data.reasoning: Summary uses domain term 'toponym' which may be unclear to general AI agents; 'geographic feature' is more interpretable. Description lacks input/output details and doesn't explain the distinction from findnearbyplacename operation. Added clarity about coordinate input format, filtering options, comprehensive output, and differentiation from place-name-only search.

message: Operation 'getcountryinfo' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lists some output fields but lacks clarity about input parameters (optional country code filtering, all countries if unspecified) and doesn't provide complete picture of available output fields. Added specifics about input flexibility and comprehensive output to improve AI agent's understanding of operation capabilities.

data.current_description: Returns country information including capital, population, area, and bounding box.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive country information for one or more countries. Accepts optional country code parameter to filter results; if omitted, returns data for all countries. Returns country details including capital city, population, area, bounding box coordinates, continent, currency, languages, and ISO codes. Useful for geographic reference data and country-level statistics.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lists some output fields but lacks clarity about input parameters (optional country code filtering, all countries if unspecified) and doesn't provide complete picture of available output fields. Added specifics about input flexibility and comprehensive output to improve AI agent's understanding of operation capabilities.
